历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 16120 → 17727 → 17709 → 29536 → 27968. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination, there was a significant fluctuation, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to about 27968. In the past two years, the overall ranking has shifted backward by about 12,000 places. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui Province was 44 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 57 in 2024, and 51 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 90 students, an increase of about 76% compared to 2025, significantly increasing enrollment quotas and causing major changes in the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in 2026, it ranks about 70th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 64–70 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle comprehensive universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature, and the university has initiated an investigation. The comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 81st, with a general evaluation, and short video exposure is at a medium-low level, with no obvious signs of rising application enthusiasm. There have been no significant records of enrollment gaps in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Geology was rated A, Archaeology was rated A, and Software Engineering was rated A-. Archaeology and Geology are the university's traditional strengths, directly corresponding to majors such as Geology (Base Class) and Archaeology in the enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026. Northwest University's Physics Category enrollment includes popular directions like Computer Science and Technology, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, and Electronic Information, which are attractive to candidates. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Anhui Province is about 451,000, slightly decreasing from about 462,000 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 313,000 (a decrease of about 2.4% from 321,000 in 2025), slightly easing competition pressure. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a comprehensive university in the northwest region. Its enrollment proportion in Anhui Province is about 1.5%–2.8%, not a major source of students for the university. The geographical distance between Shaanxi and Anhui is relatively far, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 27968, the significant expansion of Physics Category enrollment in 2026 by about 76% (plan from 51 to 90 students) leading to significantly eased competition, a slight decrease in the total number of candidates in Anhui Province, a somewhat negative university reputation but high major popularity (Computer/Electronic Information majors remain highly popular), it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly shift backward (ranking number increases). The predicted minimum ranking is about 40301, with a range of 39801–40801.

- Computer Science and Technology

- Physics (Base Class).

- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical
- Chemistry
- Pharmacy
- Emergency Management (Smart Emergency Innovation Experimental Class)
- Economics (Mathematical Economics Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category enrollment significantly expands, with a predicted ranking range of 39801–40801, significantly shifting backward from the 2025 baseline ranking. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 39000 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Oral Medicine, Computer Science and Technology, Base Classes); candidates with rankings between 39500–40500 mainly target Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Integrated Circuits, Artificial Intelligence, and other popular engineering fields), balancing cost-effectiveness; candidates with rankings after 40500 can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options. Although majors like Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical, Chemistry have lower social popularity, the university's level is high, still offering good value.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 2562 → 2881 → 2697 → 6661 → 6567. In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao with merged subject categories, the ranking significantly dropped to about 6661, and in 2025 it remained roughly stable at 6567, with an overall backward shift of about 3900 positions in the last two years. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Anhui was 21 in 2021, 22 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 14 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 20, an increase of about 43% compared to 2025, showing a clear rebound in enrollment slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 70th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of comprehensive universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism incident of Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 81st, with a general evaluation, and no obvious signs of rising application heat. No significant enrollment gaps in recent years. Archaeology was rated A (fifth round), the traditional flagship discipline of Northwest University, directly corresponding to the archaeology major in History Category admissions. Chinese Language and Literature, History, and other majors have not individually received A ratings but rely on the university's comprehensive disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature, and other liberal arts majors were evaluated as recommended to differentiated observation from 2024 to 2026, with overall stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Anhui is about 451,000, with an estimated 138,000 History Category examinees (a decrease of about 2.1% from 141,000 in 2025), slightly easing competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, and its History Category enrollment in Anhui accounts for about 0.3%–0.5%, not a major source of students for the university. Regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 6567, the 2026 History Category expansion of about 43% (plan from 14 to 20) easing competition, a slight decrease in the total number of History Category examinees in Anhui, a somewhat negative university reputation but strong appeal of flagship disciplines like archaeology, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift backward (ranking number increases), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 8106, and a range of 7606–8606.
